nasb.text: For it was when Israel had sown, that the Midianites would come up with the Amalekites and the sons of the east and go against them.

esv.text: For whenever the Israelites planted crops, the Midianites and the Amalekites and the people of the East would come up against them.

cnv.text: 每逢以色列人撒種以後，米甸人、亞瑪力人和東方人都上來，欺壓他們；

ccb.text: 每当他们撒种的时候，米甸人、亚玛力人及东方人就前来进犯，
